title: Tectonic
description: A simple and energetic pack that adds a fun touch to your Minecraft experience.
body:
### Tectonic 
is a vibrant and simple Minecraft resource pack that adds a fun and energetic touch to your Minecraft experience.

Tectonic is a vibrant and simple Minecraft resource pack that initially created back in **2015**. After years of being left unreleased and gathering dust, I've decided to share it with the world. With its bright and simplistic design, Tectonic is sure to add a fun and energetic touch to your Minecraft experience. Give it a try and see for yourself!

### Permissions

You may:
- Use this resource pack in videos; please link back to the forum thread [here](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/resource-packs/3166142), or the download page here or on [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/tectonic/files).

You may not:
- Redistribute this resource pack in any form
- Distribute derivatives or adaptations of this resource pack
- Use this resource pack on your server
- Use this resource pack commercially
